title: [INFRA] Remove ibr-web from mishal-one-web directory — 3.4GB nested repo
notes: GROUNDED: Separate git repo, own .git dir, 3.4GB. Already gitignored. Single command: rm -rf ibr-web/ or mv to ../../. No code references it. Zero risk.

title: [WEB] Add location to footer — Baker Signal 5
notes:
GROUNDED: Add

Based in Australia

to Footer.astro. One line change. Zero risk.

title: [SEC] Configure Cloudflare security headers — CSP, HSTS, XSS
notes: GROUNDED: Create public/_headers file with CSP, X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options, HSTS. Cloudflare Pages serves _headers file as custom response headers. Well-documented pattern.

title: [WEB] Create RSS feed endpoint — @astrojs/rss
notes: GROUNDED: @astrojs/rss is official Astro package. src/pages/rss.xml.ts, import getCollection, map to rss() items. Already have auto-discovery <link> in BaseHead. Pattern documented in Astro docs. If CMS: fetch from API instead of getCollection.

title: [WEB] Extend structured data — BreadcrumbList + FAQPage
notes: GROUNDED: BreadcrumbList is a simple JSON-LD array based on URL path segments. FAQPage only if content has Q&A format. Already have StructuredData.astro component. Just add to BlogLayout.

title: [WEB] Update social links — replace LinkedIn PLACEHOLDER
notes: STAKEHOLDER: Need Mishal's LinkedIn URL. Technical change is 2 lines in config.ts + llms.txt update. Blocked on: Mishal providing the URL.

title: [ARCH] Decide CMS — Payload vs Sanity — gates 10 downstream items
notes: DECIDED: Sanity Free. See ADR-001.

title: [WEB] Set up Sanity CMS with blog collection — posts CRUD + Astro fetch
notes: GROUNDED: Steps: (1) sanity.io signup, (2) npm create sanity@latest, (3) define blog schema, (4) npx astro add @sanity/astro @astrojs/react, (5) create GROQ fetch layer, (6) migrate hello-world post. Critical path — blocks BL-004/005/006/021.
human_action: Sign up at sanity.io, create project + org

title: [OPS] Set up Buttondown newsletter + RSS-to-email
notes: GROUNDED: Buttondown free tier. Create account → connect RSS feed URL (mishal.one/rss.xml) → configure auto-send cadence → style email template. GDPR: Buttondown handles double opt-in.
human_action: Sign up at buttondown.com, verify email

title: [WEB] Set up CMS media library — uploads + CDN + Astro Picture
notes: GROUNDED: Sanity built-in CDN. Image fields with hotspot:true for focal points. @sanity/image-url generates responsive srcset. Auto WebP/AVIF. Subtasks: (1) add image field to blog schema, (2) create imageUrlBuilder helper, (3) wire to Astro Picture component, (4) migrate profile photo.

title: [WEB] Build email signup component — Buttondown API
notes: GROUNDED: Simple form POSTs to Buttondown API. UTM capture stored in subscriber metadata. Upgrade to GHL when traffic justifies $97/mo.

title: [WEB] Make newsletter signup the primary CTA — Baker Signal 3
notes: GROUNDED: Add email input + Gold submit button to landing page hero section. POST to Buttondown API. Replace/supplement current social links as primary action. Success state: 'Check your inbox'.

title: [OPS] Remove noindex when site is ready — go live
notes: GROUNDED: Remove noindex={true} from BaseLayout default, keep on 404. Submit sitemap to Google Search Console. Gates: BL-003 (CMS), BL-018 (CTA), BL-026 (links).

title: [OPS] Deploy to Cloudflare Pages production — mishal.one live
notes: GROUNDED: bun run deploy already configured. Wrangler project exists. SSL via Cloudflare. Verify: robots.txt, sitemap, llms.txt, Lighthouse >90.

title: [WEB] Set up CMS pages collection — about, speaking, how-I-work
notes: GROUNDED: Sanity pages collection. Schema: title, slug, body (Portable Text), seo fields. Dynamic route [...slug].astro with GROQ fetch. Baker signals 4,9,10.

title: [OPS] Set up UTM tracking convention + attribution
notes: GROUNDED: UTM convention doc + update social links. PostHog captures UTMs natively. Document naming: utm_source=site|newsletter|twitter|linkedin, utm_medium=organic|social|email.

title: [WEB] Add share buttons to blog posts — X, LinkedIn, copy-link
notes: GROUNDED: ShareButtons.astro. URL-based sharing (twitter.com/intent/tweet, linkedin.com/sharing). Lucide icons already installed. No dependencies needed.

title: [OPS] Set up PostHog for content analytics
notes: GROUNDED: PostHog JS snippet in BaseLayout. posthog.init() with project API key. Custom events: posthog.capture('form_submit'), etc. Free tier <1M events/mo.
human_action: Sign up at posthog.com, create project, get API key

title: [WEB] Create About page — ICP + positioning — Baker Signals 8,9,10
notes: STAKEHOLDER: Content is a Mishal creative decision (positioning statement, ICP description, how-I-work process). Technical implementation is simple once content exists.
human_action: Write positioning statement, ICP description, how-I-work content

title: [OPS] Set up content scheduling — CMS + cron builds
notes: GROUNDED: Sanity Free — no native scheduling. GitHub Actions cron: rebuild every 6h. Posts with publishedAt > now() filtered in GROQ. Manual rebuild via workflow_dispatch.

title: [DOCS] Document content operations runbook
notes: DEV-WORK: Write docs/content-ops-runbook.md. Covers: weekly cadence, how to create/schedule/publish, troubleshooting, analytics review. Fits 4hrs/week operator model.

title: [OPS] Budget tracking — monthly cost cap and alerts
notes: GROUNDED: Simple docs/budget.md. Cloudflare $0, Buttondown $0-15, domain $15/yr. Set Cloudflare spending alert at $5. Total ~$15/mo until GHL added.

title: [OPS] Set up monitoring — health check + uptime
notes: GROUNDED: Betterstack free tier or Cloudflare analytics (already included). GH Actions failure notifications via email (default). 15-minute setup.
human_action: Optional: sign up at betterstack.com for uptime monitoring

title: [OPS] Create batch content workflow — end-to-end automated pipeline
notes: DEV-WORK: Integration test + documentation. Create 4 real posts, stagger dates, verify full chain fires. Capstone that proves the system works.

title: [QA] Integration test — full content pipeline end-to-end
notes: LIFECYCLE: Sprint 2 exit criteria. Manual walkthrough: CMS create → publish → build → renders → RSS valid → Buttondown received → PostHog event visible.

title: [WEB] Set up CMS testimonials collection — quote + attribution
notes: GROUNDED: Sanity testimonials collection. Schema: quote, authorName, authorRole, company, companyUrl, photo. Baker signal 12. Schema.org Review markup.

title: [WEB] Build /brand page skeleton — 8 sections from spec
notes: DEV-WORK: 8 sections from BRAND-001 spec. Colour palette reads from design tokens JSON at build time. Components: ColourSwatch, ColourPalette, AssetCard, UsageRule.

title: [WEB] Create Speaking page — Baker Signal 4
notes: Requires speaking content (topics, past appearances). Not needed for launch.
human_action: Write talk topics, bio variants, list past appearances

title: [WEB] Generate OG images per blog post — Satori + Sharp
notes: GROUNDABLE: Need to verify Satori works in Astro build-time context. Alternative: astro-og-canvas. Deferred — default og-placeholder.png works for launch.

title: [OPS] Set up auto-post to X on CMS publish — webhook chain
notes: GROUNDABLE: Sanity webhook → Cloudflare Worker → X API v2. Need X developer account ($100/mo Basic tier or free with limited access).
human_action: Apply for X developer account, get API keys

title: [OPS] Set up Go High Level account + API key + pipeline
notes: DEFERRED: GHL parked until 10K weekly visitors (ADR-002). No monetization or CRM until traffic is proven.
human_action: Sign up at gohighlevel.com ($97/mo) — deferred until 10K visitors

title: [OPS] Create GHL welcome email workflow — drip sequence
notes: DEFERRED: GHL parked. Welcome email handled by Buttondown auto-responder instead.

title: [ARCH] Research paywalled content approach — tiers + payment
notes: DEFERRED: Research only, no implementation. Revisit after 20+ published posts and proven audience.
